body: import org.apache.commons.codec.EncoderException;
import org.junit.Test;
import org.apache.commons.codec.StringEncoder;
import org.apache.commons.codec.StringEncoderAbstractTest;
import org.junit.Assert;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertEquals;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertFalse;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertTrue;

translation: self.assertEqual("Rule type should have been set to exact", RuleType.EXACT, bmpm.getRuleType())
self.assertEqual("Name type should have been set to ash", NameType.ASHKENAZI, bmpm.getNameType())
self.assertFalse("Should be able to set concat to false", bmpm.isConcat())

translation: def __assertNotEmpty(self, bmpm: BeiderMorseEncoder, value: str) -> None:
assert value != "", f"Expected non-empty string, but got '' for input '{value}'"
assert bmpm.encode1(value) != "", f"Expected non-empty encoded string, but got '' for input '{value}'"
